title: Lightning Crashes
why_this_song: Lightning Crashes by Live (1994) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: This moment she's been waiting for
Her placenta falls to the floor

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "feel" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "feel" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "thunder" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "thunder" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Like a rolling thunder chasing the wind
I can feel it coming back again

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Her placenta falls to the floor
Pale blue colored iris, presents the circle

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Lightning Crashes" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Lightning Crashes" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Lightning Crashes" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Lightning Crashes", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Lightning Crashes" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Lightning Crashes" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Lightning Crashes" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Lightning Crashes" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Lightning Crashes" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Lightning Crashes" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).
